text.title: ops-pricing-strategy Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ops-pricing-strategy as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Never changing prices after initial launch.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Market evolves. Costs change. Competitors adjust. Quarterly price review prevents gradual value misalignment.

failure-mode.description: Hiding prices behind "contact us" for sub-$1K ARR products.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Friction and distrust. Buyers expect transparent pricing for self-serve products. "Contact us" signals the price will be painful or negotiated, which repels price-sensitive early adopters.
